_description: Canonical hiai-opencode runtime config. Copy this file to .opencode/hiai-opencode.json and edit it there. This file is the user-facing source of truth for agent models, category models, MCP switches, LSP defaults, skill discovery, service auth placeholders, and local helper defaults. Model provider credentials are configured in OpenCode Connect; this file stores model IDs only.

bob.description: Primary orchestrator for end-to-end task execution, delegation, and high-level workflow control.

coder.description: High-depth executor for multi-file implementation, substantial refactors, and technical delivery.

strategist.description: Planning and architecture agent for decomposition, sequencing, and decision framing before execution.

guard.description: Execution supervisor that routes work, enforces discipline, and keeps delegated flows on track.

critic.description: High-accuracy review gate for implementation quality, correctness, and plan validation.

designer.description: Creative visual problem-solver for high-touch UI, interaction, and brand-level interface direction.

researcher.description: Codebase exploration and external documentation research.

platform-manager.description: Manager. Unified platform management agent for session continuity, project initialization, and orchestration.

brainstormer.description: Idea exploration agent for divergent thinking, option generation, and concept shaping before execution.

multimodal.description: Vision. Multimodal analysis agent for images, PDFs, diagrams, and other non-text inputs.

sub.description: Hidden compatibility executor. Primary subtask execution is handled by Coder.

quality-guardian.description: Hidden compatibility review agent. Primary review work is handled by Critic.

agent-skills.description: Hidden system agent for skill registry, discovery, and capability orchestration.

visual-engineering.description: Frontend and UI systems work with design-system discipline. Uses Coder deep execution contour.

artistry.description: High-effort creative problem solving beyond standard patterns. Uses Coder deep execution contour.

ultrabrain.description: Hard logic and architecture tasks. Uses Coder deep execution contour.

deep.description: Deep autonomous implementation with full context buildup. Uses Coder deep execution contour.

quick.description: Fast bounded execution: single-file fixes, typos, and simple modifications. Uses Coder fast execution contour.

writing.description: Documentation and prose tasks with bounded scope. Uses Coder fast execution contour.

git.description: Git, commit, diff, and repository hygiene tasks.

unspecified-low.description: Unclassifiable moderate tasks with bounded scope. Uses Coder fast execution contour.

unspecified-high.description: Unclassifiable substantial tasks across modules. Uses Coder deep execution contour.
